params.name: Euclid's Elements
params.source:
* Hellenic Treasure Map (20%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.1%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (72k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Nov 6, 300 BC, Euclid completed the most famous work in the history of mathematics. 

The 13 books of "Euclid's Elements" contain 5 hypotheses, 5 postulates, 25 definitions, and 48 propositions. It is a record of mathematical knowledge gathered during the ancient Greek era. It listed certain general facts according to definitions and axioms and used them to study the properties of various geometric shapes logically. It formed a solid logical system to prove propositions and obtain theorems an …
